allow: Bash(for file in Gestion_de_usuario.php Gestion_de_camiones.php Pantalla.php)

Bash(do sed -i 's/background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #E63946, #D62839, #457B9D, #1D3557);/background: var(--accent-dark);/g; s/background-size: 400% 400%;/background-size: 100% 100%;/g; s/animation: gradientBG [0-9]*s ease infinite;/animation: none;/g' "$file")
